name: kade-hand-rises
prompt: Medium close-up two-shot. Dark-haired young man reaching toward silver-haired woman's face, burn-scarred hand hovering near her cheek without touching. She faces him, ice-blue eyes wide, lips parted. Heat from his hand meeting cold from her skin, visible steam between them. Intimate tension. Storage room background. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Kade
dialogue.text: You're exhausted. You're empty. And the girl who wants you doesn't actually see you — she just wants to own you.

name: rei-stop
prompt: Extreme close-up on lips and throat. Pale pink lips slightly parted, breath visible as melting frost. Throat visible — the swallow before speaking. Barely a whisper escaping. Vulnerable, wanting. Soft warm lighting creeping in. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: kade-make-me
prompt: Close-up on eyes. Amber eyes now burning gold, intense, challenging but gentle. Heat visible as glow. Not backing down. Dim storage room, concrete wall behind. Intimate confrontation. Warm lighting, dramatic. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style
